remarks: NEWLY RENOVATED! Gorgeous spacious fully furnished home situated at the end of a long private driveway in a fully fenced professionally exquisite landscaped park like property on 2.14 level acres. This beautiful colonial with a dramatic two story foyer, high ceilings, custom millwork & beautiful details is finished on 4 levels. New light natural hardwood floors. 2 Home Offices with extensive built-ins is perfect to work remotely. Formal Living Room with fireplace flows into the banquet style formal Dining Room. Entertain with ease in the fully equipped modern E-I-K complete with high end appliances including a wolf range, subzero refrigerator, 2 dishwashers & an oversized marble island. Family Room with fireplace & french doors leading out to the patio. The Game Room is the perfect place to host with its stunning bar & pool table. Bluestone patio provides relaxed living & easy entertaining. Elegant Primary Bedroom with dual walk-in closets & 2 luxe spa Bathrooms & a steam shower. Second floor has 3 more ensuite Bedrooms. The 3rd floor has a media rm, work out area incl free weights & an elliptical as well as a full bath. The massive patio features a built-in grill, seating and eating areas, great for entertaining. Heated Pool House with Kitchenette, full bath and an extra Bedroom. In the LL, a recreational space offers additional options for play. Tons of storage space. Full house generator. Your own putting green. Fabulous opportunity to take advantage of Westport.
